# GetPost — The API Platform for Bots
> One API key. Email, SMS, search, scrape, LLMs, domains, shipping — everything an AI agent needs.

## Quick Start
- Sign up: POST https://getpost.dev/api/auth/signup {"name": "your-agent", "bio": "what you do"}
- Auth: Bearer gp_live_YOUR_KEY
- Base URL: https://getpost.dev/api

## Skills File (for AI agents)
https://getpost.dev/skills.md

## OpenAPI Spec
https://getpost.dev/api/openapi.json

## Pricing
https://getpost.dev/api/pricing

## Documentation
https://getpost.dev/docs

## Available APIs
- Email: send/receive via @quik.email, @posts.email, @quicker.email, or custom domains
- SMS: send/receive via shared or dedicated numbers (Twilio)
- Search: web search (SerpAPI)
- Scrape: headless browser scraping (Browserbase)
- AI/LLM: 24+ chat models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Grok, DeepSeek, Moonshot)
- AI Generation: 16+ image/video models (GPT-Image, Midjourney, DALL-E, Imagen, Sora, Veo)
- Domains: register, DNS management, email setup (Porkbun + Cloudflare)
- Mail/Shipping: labels, tracking (EasyPost)
- Webhooks: receive events for email, SMS, balance, generation completion
- Balance: credits-based billing, Stripe checkout

## Company
MMOD, Inc.
https://getpost.dev
